programme.title: 2010. O jogo começará, decidindo quem representará o Japão. Durante toda a partida, os jogadores apelam ferozmente para serem escolhidos para a equipe nacional. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E69

programme.title: 2010. O Inazuma Japão iniciou seus treinamentos com o treinador Kudou. No entanto, eles logo perceberão que ele é um treinador rigoroso. Eles começam a se preocupar ainda mais quando sabem do passado dele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E70

programme.title: 2010. Não importa o que Endou e os outros façam, o treinador Kudou não os deixará deixar o prédio onde estão hospedados. Mas, por alguma razão, deixe Toramaru ir para casa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E71

programme.title: 2010. A partida entre Inazuma Japão e Big Waves continua, mas com um ponto na liderança favoreceu as ondas grandes. Kidou Yuuto finalmente rompe a tática hissatsu. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A luta escaldante contra os leões do deserto
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E72

programme.title: 2010. O próximo jogo do Inazuma Japão é contra o time do Catar, o Desert Lion. Tudo parece estar bem, já que o primeiro semestre termina com o Japão com dois pontos de vantagem. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E73

programme.title: 2010. Enquanto a partida continua, os jogadores do Inazuma Japan caem no calor um após o outro. Até Kidou tem que mudar devido a uma lesão. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E74

programme.title: 2010. A Inazuma do Japão está treinando duro à medida que as finais da Ásia se aproximam e, com Toramaru agora mais assertivo, eles podem finalmente tirar todo o seu poder, exceto Tobitaka. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E75

programme.title: 2010. Após os dois jogos, o Inazuma Japan teve uma boa ideia de como é o nível mundial. Para avançar para o torneio mundial, eles precisarão desenvolver novas técnicas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E76

programme.title: 2010. O Neo Japan continua a atacar agressivamente com técnicas de Hissatsu, e o Inazuma Japan não consegue superar sua defesa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: Estratégia de truque final de Cammy
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E77

programme.title: 2012. Mesmo que o Seigi no Tekken tenha acabado de evoluir, o treinador Kudou diz a Endou que nunca chegará ao torneio mundial do jeito que está atualmente. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E78

programme.title: 2018. Na pequena e remota Ilha Do Sol Posto, encontramos Sonny Wright e seus companheiros de equipe, que amam futebol mais do que qualquer outra coisa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E01

programme.title: 2018. Ao chegar, Sonny Wright e seus companheiros descobrem que os jogadores anteriores se separaram temporariamente. Com o peso do prestígio em seus ombros, os jogadores da Ilha Do Sol Posto se tornam os novos Raimon Eleven. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E02

programme.title: 2018. Todos, incluindo o craque da Academia Polestar, Elliot Ember, são pegos de surpresa. Raimon marca o primeiro gol do jogo! No entanto, apesar do ótimo começo, Raimon acaba perdendo para as jogadas poderosas da Academia Polestar Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E03

programme.title: 2018. A segunda partida eliminatória começa com Raimon vs Colégio Rampart! Mister Yi usa a pulseira Inazuma para ordenar que Raimon Eleven apenas se defenda Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E04

programme.title: 2018. A Academia Polestar é uma escola de prestígio, onde os alunos são treinados nas artes literárias e militares. O próximo grande jogo deles é contra o Colégio Kirkwood, escola do famoso centroavante flamejante, Axel Blaze Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.sub-title: O lado negro da Academia Polestar
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E05

programme.title: 2018. Começa Academia Polestar vs Colégio Kirkwood! Dominando a Academia Polestar, Axel Blaze marca o primeiro gol com sua famosa Super Técnica, Tornado de Fogo Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Lucas Almedia, Danilo Diniz, Ricardo Dunt Diretor: Akihiro Hino
programme.desc: Super Onze: Ares no Tenbin - T01E06

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E262
programme.sub-title: A Festa do Chá da Princesa
programme.desc: 2022. Kawaki tem dificuldade em se acostumar com a vida escolar, mas consegue se tornar amigo da princesa Kae, objeto de sua missão de guarda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E263
programme.sub-title: Desabroche, Hana! Os Dons da Professora!
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto, Sarada e Mitsuki dão uma palestra especial na Academia para calouros como Kawaki e Himawari. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E264
programme.sub-title: A Equipe de Investigação dos Sete Mistérios É Formada!
programme.desc: 2022. Depois de aprender sobre os “Sete Mistérios” na Academia Ninja, Himawari e vários de seus colegas decidem ir investigar à noite. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E265
programme.sub-title: Rivalidade Entre Equipes: O Treinamento Prático
programme.desc: 2022. Kawaki e Himawari participam de um treino na floresta perto da academia. A classe é dividida em equipes de três pessoas e Kawaki acaba em uma equipe diferente de Kae. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E266
programme.desc: 2022. Osuka Kamakura é sequestrado para resgate junto com Himawari. Quando o líder descobre que ela é filha do Hokage, ele começa a pensar em maneiras de usá-la a seu favor também. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E267
programme.desc: 2022. A turma de Kawaki e Himawari fará uma peça sobre o Sannin Lendário para o festival da escola. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E268
programme.desc: 2022. O festival escolar da Academia começa e Kawaki encontra alguém que acredita ser o assassino que visa Kae. Apesar de suas preocupações, ele se concentra no ensaio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E269
programme.desc: 2022. Por não ter denunciado o assassino, Kawaki é retirado da missão e colocado de licença. Enquanto isso, o retorno de Kae para casa é apressado por este incidente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E270
programme.desc: 2022. Hana, que se recuperou dos ferimentos, e Kawaki, que está protegendo Kae, voltam para a aula. A vida na Academia gradualmente volta ao normal. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E271
programme.desc: 2022. A turma de Kawaki e Himawari faz uma viagem de campo a uma ilha desabitada para criar novas memórias com Kae. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E272
programme.desc: 2022. O assassino que visa Kae foi finalmente revelado. Por causa de seus confrontos anteriores, Kawaki sabe que eles são um inimigo poderoso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Disfarce de Kawaki - T18E273
programme.desc: 2022. Kae foi levada e Kawaki deve enfrentar um perigoso assassino. Himawari atua como seu parceiro e fornece suporte durante a batalha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E274
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto acompanha Sasuke a um treinador de falcões para obter um falcão mensageiro. Lá, Boruto e Sasuke ouvem falar de uma pessoa que vende animais raros e decidem investigar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E275
programme.desc: 2022. O falcão de Tsuzura foi vendido repentinamente, então ele faz o que pode para recuperar seu precioso pássaro. Ao ouvir o que aconteceu, Boruto ignora Sasuke e corre para ajudar. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E276
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto cochila no Thunder Train e acorda em um local desconhecido junto com os outros passageiros. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E277
programme.desc: 2022. Enquanto as cobaias caem uma a uma, Boruto tenta encontrar uma maneira de tirar todos vivos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E278
programme.desc: 2022. Enquanto todos estão exaustos com os experimentos de Ouga, uma cobaia fala sobre seus objetivos, o que leva todos a falar sobre o que querem fazer se sobreviverem. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E279
programme.desc: 2022. Enquanto Boruto e os demais são obrigados a participar dos experimentos de Ouga, Sarada e sua equipe investigam o desaparecimento de Boruto e descobrem a existência de um indivíduo suspeito. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E280
programme.desc: 2022. Ignorando o perigo para sua própria vida, Boruto diz aos outros cobaias para escapar enquanto ele enfrenta a pessoa que pode estar trabalhando para Ouga. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Jogo do labirinto - T19E281
programme.desc: 2022. Boruto desperta para descobrir que está de volta onde se encontrou pela primeira vez. \"Não confie em nada\" foram as palavras deixadas para trás por uma ex-cobaia. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.desc: 2023. Naruto adoece e Sasuke vai para o Observatório Tatar, uma instalação na Terra de Redaku, para tentar encontrar uma cura. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Sasuke Retsuden - T20E283
programme.desc: 2023. Sasuke é atacado por Meno, o guardião do Observatório, e depois envenenado. programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers and falls in love with a struggling, but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him. Starring Bradley Cooper, Lady Gaga, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: A surprise encounter with Howard leaves Kanan speechless; Raquel tries to settle in new territory, but while investigating a missing business associate with her money, she meets an old adversary.

programme.desc: Kanan and Jukebox search for answers in family matters; when Raq's push into new territory stalls, she proposes a meeting; Crown helps Famous get settled; Still investigating Howard's shooting, Burke questions Unique.

programme.title: Easy Land

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a gang leader who faces certain death without their help; upon learning the abductor's identity, Magnus ceases all attempts at rescue.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr Helen Magnus, a 158-year-old English scientist, seeks out extraordinarily-powered creatures, known as Abnormals.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Members of the mysterious and spooky Addams Family -- Gomez, Morticia, Pugsley, Wednesday, Uncle Fester and Grandma -- encounter a shady TV personality who despises their eerie hilltop mansion. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Addams Family 2
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer as a family, Gomez, Morticia and the rest of the Addams clan embark on an adventurous road trip in a hideous and humongous camper. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: Watermark
programme.desc: This documentary brings together diverse stories from around the globe and explores our relationship with water and how it shapes humanity. Starring Edward Burtynsky.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of art scholars and other experts infiltrates enemy territory to retrieve stolen masterpieces before the Nazis destroy them. Starring George Clooney, Matt Damon, Bill Murray.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's acclaimed account of an English boy's life in a WWII internment camp in Japanese-occupied China. Starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich, Miranda Richardson.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Boy
programme.desc: When Scott and Teresa learn their son, Austin, is autistic and has brittle bone disease, they worry about his future. However, with Scott's growing faith and Austin's incredible spirit, they find joy, gratitude and courage in the most trying times. Starring Zachary Levi, Meghann Fahy, Patricia Heaton.

programme.title: Armageddon Time
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about the strength of family and the generational pursuit of the American dream. Starring Anne Hathaway, Jeremy Strong, Michael Banks Repeta.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq focuses on mother-son bonding with Kanan in the Catskills, but they get interrupted when business follows them; Crown disrespects Lou, bringing their simmering beef to a boil; Burke digs into Howard's personal life.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Raq assures everyone they need to follow orders and keep working as planned; Kanan takes on more responsibility, but things go wrong when he runs into neighborhood kids; Lou feels the pressure in his partnership with Crown.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: The F Word
programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend. Starring Daniel Radcliffe, Zoe Kazan, Megan Park.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback. Starring Ethan Hawke, Carmen Ejogo, Callum Keith Rennie.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henry's double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee. Starring Laurence Fishburne, Angela Bassett, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An image consultant transforms a tomboyish FBI agent into a beauty queen so she can work undercover to catch a terrorist. Starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the town's full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcott's classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy, Paul Bettany, Alan Tudyk), competes against nobles in 14th-century France. Starring Heath Ledger, Mark Addy, Rufus Sewell.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Jumping back in time, Gia struggles to write her book about sex in America; embarking on a love story of her own, Gia processes the pain of her own losses; she moves to Indiana and bonds with Lina.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina, Sloane, and Maggie connect with their hearts' desire, unaware of the fallout that awaits them.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father. Starring Ana de Armas, Keanu Reeves, Ian McShane.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Mélanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Being Canadian
programme.desc: Rob Cohen tries to find out what it really means to be Canadian.

programme.title: Breakfast With Scot
programme.desc: Gay partners (Tom Cavanagh, Ben Shenkman) become the temporary guardians of a flamboyant orphan (Noah Bernett). Starring Tom Cavanagh, Ben Shenkman, Noah Bernett.

programme.title: Cairo Time
programme.desc: During a vacation in Egypt, an unexpected love affair arises between a magazine editor (Patricia Clarkson) and her husband's former colleague (Alexander Siddig). Starring Patricia Clarkson, Alexander Siddig, Elena Anaya.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: On a mission to find a new master to serve, three Minions meet Scarlet Overkill, the world's first female supervillain. Starring Sandra Bullock, Jon Hamm, Michael Keaton.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: As he tries to execute a fiendish plot to steal the moon, a supervillain meets his match in three little orphan girls who want to make him their dad. Starring Steve Carell, Jason Segel, Russell Brand.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Just as Gru settles into his new role as a suburban family man, the ultrasecret Anti-Villain League sends him on a mission to nab the perpetrator of a spectacular heist. Starring Steve Carell, Kristen Wiig, Benjamin Bratt.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Fired from the Anti-Villain League, Gru travels to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who's out for revenge. Starring Steve Carell, Kristen Wiig, Trey Parker.

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: After burning though eight lives, Puss in Boots sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore all nine. Starring Antonio Banderas, Salma Hayek, Olivia Colman.

programme.title: Pee-wee's Big Adventure
programme.desc: Childlike Pee-wee (Paul Reubens) loses his vintage bicycle and embarks on a cross-country adventure to get it back. Starring Paul Reubens, E.G. Daily, Mark Holton.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: February 2nd keeps repeating for a cynical TV weatherman (Bill Murray) sent to watch the groundhog in Punxsutawney, Pa. Starring Bill Murray, Andie MacDowell, Chris Elliott.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: A home-theater installer leads a team of old-school arcade champs and a military specialist in a battle against aliens who base their attacks on 1980s era video games. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Michelle Monaghan.

programme.title: The Upside
programme.desc: A wealthy quadriplegic hires a struggling parolee to be his caretaker in his upscale New York penthouse. Despite coming from two different worlds, an unlikely friendship starts to blossom as both men rediscover the joy of living life to the fullest. Starring Kevin Hart, Bryan Cranston, Nicole Kidman.

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind
programme.desc: Mathematics expert John Forbes Nash Jr. has paranoid schizophrenia but becomes a Nobel laureate late in life. Starring Russell Crowe, Ed Harris, Jennifer Connelly.

programme.title: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: A team of scientists on an expedition finds themselves caught up in the cataclysmic battle between aliens and predators - and no matter which species wins, the humans lose. Starring Sanaa Lathan, Raoul Bova, Lance Henriksen.

programme.title: Atanarjuat
programme.desc: A depiction of the Inuit people of the Canadian arctic, telling the story of a crime that ruptures the trust within a closely knit group and how justice is achieved and healing begins. Starring Natar Ungalaaq, Sylvia Ivalu, Peter-Henry Arnatsiaq.

programme.title: 55 Days at Peking
programme.desc: Soldiers from 11 countries and a Marine major (Charlton Heston) guard a besieged compound during the Boxer Rebellion. Starring Charlton Heston, Ava Gardner, David Niven.

programme.title: The Beast of the City
programme.desc: A police chief (Walter Huston) fighting crime and corruption is betrayed by his brother (Wallace Ford) who falls for a gun moll (Jean Harlow). Starring Walter Huston, Jean Harlow, Wallace Ford.

programme.title: Frances
programme.desc: Actress Frances Farmer makes trouble in the 1930s and '40s Hollywood; her mother commits her to a barbaric asylum. Starring Jessica Lange, Kim Stanley, Sam Shepard.

programme.title: Gable and Lombard
programme.desc: Stars Clark Gable (James Brolin) and Carole Lombard (Jill Clayburgh) fall in love and marry in the 1930s Hollywood. Starring James Brolin, Jill Clayburgh, Allen Garfield.

programme.title: W.C. Fields and Me
programme.desc: The Hollywood comedian's (Rod Steiger) story is told as recalled by Carlotta Monti (Valerie Perrine), his longtime mistress. Starring Rod Steiger, Valerie Perrine, John Marley.

programme.title: The Story of Will Rogers
programme.desc: The homespun humorist and social critic (Will Rogers Jr.) starts as a cowboy and goes on to vaudeville, movies, radio. Starring Will Rogers Jr., Jane Wyman.

programme.title: One Way Passage
programme.desc: A condemned man (William Powell) and dying woman (Kay Francis) fall in love on a ship from Hong Kong to San Francisco. Starring William Powell, Kay Francis, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Two Heads on a Pillow
programme.desc: Newlyweds (Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan) break up, then meet again as opposing lawyers on an annulment case. Starring Neil Hamilton, Miriam Jordan, Henry Armetta.

programme.title: Three Came Home
programme.desc: A U.S. writer (Claudette Colbert) and her British husband (Patric Knowles) endure a Japanese colonel's (Sessue Hayakawa) prison camp. Starring Claudette Colbert, Patric Knowles, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: The Four Feathers
programme.desc: An English officer (John Clements) fights in the Sudan after receiving white feathers of cowardice from friends. Starring John Clements, Ralph Richardson, C. Aubrey Smith.

programme.title: Five and Ten
programme.desc: A dime-store heiress (Marion Davies) rejects a New Yorker (Leslie Howard), then destroys his marriage. Starring Marion Davies, Leslie Howard, Irene Rich.

programme.title: 6 Day Bike Rider
programme.desc: A small-town clerk (Joe E. Brown) impresses his girlfriend (Maxine Doyle) by entering a big-city bicycle race. Starring Joe E. Brown, Maxine Doyle, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: Millionaire Playboy
programme.desc: A psychiatrist takes a young man to a resort where he hopes a bevy of beauties can cure his patient of hiccuping. Starring Joe Penner, Linda Hayes, Russ Brown.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: A British POW colonel (Alec Guinness) orders his men to build their Japanese captor (Sessue Hayakawa) a railway bridge in the jungle. Starring William Holden, Alec Guinness, Sessue Hayakawa.

programme.title: Uptown Saturday Night
programme.desc: Blue-collar buddies (Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby) search the underworld for a winning lottery ticket lost in a nightclub holdup. Starring Sidney Poitier, Bill Cosby, Harry Belafonte.

programme.title: No Time for Sergeants
programme.desc: A Georgia rube (Andy Griffith) joins the peacetime Air Force and talks back to his sergeant (Myron McCormick). Starring Andy Griffith, Myron McCormick, Nick Adams.

programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet
programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats. Starring Don Knotts, Carole Cook, Jack Weston.

programme.title: Body and Soul
programme.desc: A gospel preacher (Paul Robeson) sinks in sin and corruption. Starring Paul Robeson, Julia Theresa Russell, Marshall Rogers.

programme.title: Flesh and the Devil
programme.desc: A wicked woman (Greta Garbo) dishonors her husband and divides two Austrian officers (John Gilbert, Lars Hanson). Starring Greta Garbo, John Gilbert, Lars Hanson.

programme.title: The Cat and the Fiddle
programme.desc: A New York soprano (Jeanette MacDonald) meets a struggling composer (Ramon Novarro) in Brussels and saves his operetta on opening night. Starring Ramon Novarro, Jeanette MacDonald, Frank Morgan.

programme.title: To Have and Have Not
programme.desc: A boat skipper (Humphrey Bogart) flirts with a singer (Lauren Bacall) and fools Nazis on the island of Martinique. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Lauren Bacall, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: Night and Day
programme.desc: Ivy League songwriter Cole Porter (Cary Grant) joins World War I, marries a rich British nurse (Alexis Smith) and returns to Broadway. Starring Cary Grant, Alexis Smith, Ginny Simms.

programme.title: Tea and Sympathy
programme.desc: Marked as a sissy, a preppie turns to his housemaster's understanding wife. Starring Deborah Kerr, John Kerr, Leif Erickson.

programme.title: The Flame and the Arrow
programme.desc: An acrobatic rebel (Burt Lancaster) and his band of mountain men trick Hessian mercenaries in medieval Italy. Starring Burt Lancaster, Virginia Mayo, Robert Douglas.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: MacArthur
programme.desc: Gen. Douglas MacArthur (Gregory Peck) returns to the Philippines, manages postwar Japan and defies President Truman (Ed Flanders). Starring Gregory Peck, Ed Flanders, Dan O'Herlihy.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: Allied commandos (Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn) try to knock out a Nazi fortress over the Aegean. Starring Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn.

programme.title: Pork Chop Hill
programme.desc: A lieutenant (Gregory Peck) is ordered to take an inconsequential hill during the Korean War truce talks. Starring Gregory Peck, Harry Guardino, Rip Torn.

programme.title: God Is My Co-Pilot
programme.desc: Col. Robert L. Scott Jr. (Dennis Morgan) becomes a member of Gen. Chennault's (Raymond Massey) Flying Tigers in World War II. Starring Dennis Morgan, Dane Clark, Raymond Massey.

programme.title: Days of Glory
programme.desc: A Soviet guerrilla leader (Gregory Peck) falls in love with a dark beauty (Tamara Toumanova), and together they fight the Nazis. Starring Tamara Toumanova, Gregory Peck, Alan Reed.

programme.title: The Sea Wolves
programme.desc: World War II British agents (Gregory Peck, Roger Moore) send retired Calcutta cavalrymen to sink three German ships off the coast of Goa. Starring Gregory Peck, Roger Moore, David Niven.

programme.title: Captain Newman, M.D.
programme.desc: A stateside psychiatrist (Gregory Peck) treats a corporal (Bobby Darin), colonel and captain for war-related problems in 1944. Starring Gregory Peck, Tony Curtis, Bobby Darin.

programme.title: The Red Badge of Courage
programme.desc: Based on Stephen Crane's novel of a young Union soldier panicked upon exposure to his first Civil War battle. Starring Audie Murphy, Bill Mauldin, John Dierkes.

programme.title: Skirts Ahoy!
programme.desc: Unlucky in love, three women (Esther Williams, Joan Evans, Vivian Blaine) join the WAVES to see the world and meet men. Starring Esther Williams, Joan Evans, Vivian Blaine.

programme.title: Marine Raiders
programme.desc: A Marine major (Pat O'Brien) looks out for his captain (Robert Ryan) on Guadalcanal and in Australia. Starring Pat O'Brien, Robert Ryan, Ruth Hussey.

programme.title: Darby's Rangers
programme.desc: Maj. William Darby (James Garner) forms the Rangers for direct assaults on World War II North Africa and Italy. Starring James Garner, Etchika Choureau, Jack Warden.

programme.title: Take the High Ground
programme.desc: Two Army sergeants (Richard Widmark, Karl Malden) use different methods to produce soldiers at Fort Bliss, Texas. Starring Richard Widmark, Karl Malden, Elaine Stewart.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: Daffy attempts to evade the draft board.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: Cracking a Japanese code leads Adm. Nimitz (Henry Fonda) and Navy officers (Charlton Heston, James Coburn) to Yamamoto's fleet in the Battle of Midway, June 1942. Starring Charlton Heston, Henry Fonda, James Coburn.

programme.title: Thirty Seconds Over Tokyo
programme.desc: Lt. Col. James Doolittle (Spencer Tracy) leads B-25s off the USS Hornet's deck on a 1942 mission to bomb Japan. Starring Spencer Tracy, Van Johnson, Robert Walker.

programme.title: The Hook
programme.desc: A U.S. sergeant (Kirk Douglas) and two privates (Robert Walker, Nick Adams) are ordered to kill a wounded prisoner during the Korean War. Starring Kirk Douglas, Robert Walker Jr., Nick Adams.

programme.title: The Hasty Heart
programme.desc: A patient (Ronald Reagan) and a nurse (Patricia Neal) comfort a dying Scottish soldier (Richard Todd) in World War II Burma. Starring Ronald Reagan, Patricia Neal, Richard Todd.

programme.title: Nobody Wants to Talk About Jacob Appelbaum
programme.desc: A look at Jacob Appelbaum's online privacy advocacy, allegations of sexual misconduct against him, his role exposing government surveillance programs, and the impact on his career as a former WikiLeaks associate.

programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: The Painter
programme.desc: An ex-CIA operative is tracked down by a young woman and they become entangled in an unauthorized black ops program. Starring Charlie Weber, Madison Bailey, Jon Voight.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A savvy poker player cleans up at the tables once at sea, but when she witnesses a man overboard, many begin to wonder if it was accidental or on purpose.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A farmer and his wife take a cruise celebrating their hard work and good fortune, but their luck changes drastically and the friends who are on board celebrating with them now aid in the search for the farmer who is now missing at sea.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: After a series of security lapses, Wells Fargo had over $7 Million stolen in one night in a heist dubbed White Eagle; bizarrely, it was pulled of by a revolutionary guerrilla group from Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Shawnie meets Ron online and the romance develops over a shared love of athletics; Shawnie moves to the mountains to be with Ron, but when his erratic behavior turns from manipulative to criminal, she must confront Ron's secret life.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A family man goes missing in a small West Virginian town known for its sweet mountain air.

programme.title: Birdeater
programme.desc: A bride-to-be joins her own fiancé's bachelor party in the remote Australian Outback. As the festivities spiral into beer-soaked chaos, uncomfortable details about their relationship are exposed, turning the celebration into a feral nightmare. Starring Mackenzie Fearnley, Shabana Azeez, Ben Hunter.

programme.title: Some Other Woman
programme.desc: Eve sees a strange woman watching her and her husband from outside their home. As the stranger slowly intrudes further into their lives, Eve begins to question if she's losing her mind or her husband's loyalty. Starring Tom Felton, Amanda Crew, Ashley Greene.

programme.title: Birdeater
programme.desc: A bride-to-be joins her own fiancé's bachelor party in the remote Australian Outback. As the festivities spiral into beer-soaked chaos, uncomfortable details about their relationship are exposed, turning the celebration into a feral nightmare. Starring Mackenzie Fearnley, Shabana Azeez, Ben Hunter.

programme.title: Some Other Woman
programme.desc: Eve sees a strange woman watching her and her husband from outside their home. As the stranger slowly intrudes further into their lives, Eve begins to question if she's losing her mind or her husband's loyalty. Starring Tom Felton, Amanda Crew, Ashley Greene.

programme.title: Rise of the Footsoldier: Vengeance
programme.desc: Pat Tate sets out on a rampage to avenge his trusted foot soldier's violent death, going into the dark side of Soho to track down the villain responsible. He'll stop at nothing to enact his revenge, even as the world around him starts to explode. Starring Craig Fairbrass, Jamie Foreman, George Russo.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When Jennifer Cave fails to show up at her new job, her family fears the worst; their fears are confirmed when they take their search for her into their own hands.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police brings in Sergeant Jeffrey Pelo for questioning after being identified prowling outside a young woman's house in the middle of the night; adamant he's done nothing wrong, interrogators walk a tight rope questioning one of their own.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A confession to a lesser crime is still a false confession; when Nick Nehring admits to gunning down a man, claims of self-defense set him up for a shorter sentence; getting the true story could mean the difference of year.

programme.title: The Hands That Feed Us
programme.desc: Exploring the challenges of making a living as a modern Canadian farmer; how they sell their food and how little control they have over the process and price; from small scale to massive debt; from farmer's markets to supply chain.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: A lonely and socially awkward woman tries to make a connection with a friendly new co-worker who takes her out on a date. Starring Daisy Ridley, Dave Merheje, Parvesh Cheena.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: When Jennifer Cave fails to show up at her new job, her family fears the worst; their fears are confirmed when they take their search for her into their own hands.

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son. Starring Kylee Bush, Jill Teed, Sarah Christine Smith.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love. Starring Golda Rosheuvel, John Hannah, Sophie Cookson.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying

programme.title: Propaganda: The Art of Selling Lies

programme.title: The Luckiest Man in America
programme.desc: An ice-cream truck driver discovers a secret way to win as a contestant on the game show "Press Your Luck." Starring Paul Walter Hauser, Walton Goggins, Shamier Anderson.

programme.title: Ride (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to raise money for his daughter's cancer treatment, a retired bull rider teams up with his estranged son to orchestrate a robbery. However, they must soon outwit the local police if they want to keep the cash and their freedom.

programme.title: Into the Wild (2007)
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine (2022)
programme.desc: Reclusive and controversial author Bruce Cogburn is drawn out of hiding when he begins to receive endless letters from an obsessive fan. What ensues is a dangerous labyrinth as Bruce searches for the person behind the cryptic messages.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widow's (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill (1987)
programme.desc: An account of the 101st Airborne Division's 10-day struggle to secure a strategic mountainside in South Vietnam.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: The Hurricane (1999)
programme.desc: Aided by a Brooklyn teen (Vicellous Reon Shannon) and three Canadians, boxer Rubin Carter (Denzel Washington) fights to be exonerated after long imprisonment for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31 (2025)
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet that's tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1991)
programme.desc: Two Navy pilots (Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson) hatch a rogue mission to bomb Hanoi with a special low-altitude plane.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isn't hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.title: Doin' It (2024)
programme.desc: Moonlighting as a high-school substitute teacher, a 30-year-old virgin gets in over her head when she's assigned to teach sex education.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: The Sense of an Ending (2017)
programme.desc: A business owner (Jim Broadbent) reunites with his first love (Charlotte Rampling) after a letter and a diary force him to confront the past.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: The Faculty (1998)
programme.desc: A group of small town High School students, including an introverted photographer and a drug dealer, begin to suspect something's off with their teachers. They realize that the faculty is under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites.

programme.title: Certain Women (2016)
programme.desc: Three strong-willed women (Kristen Stewart, Laura Dern, Michelle Williams) strive to forge their own paths amidst the wide-open plains of the American Northwest.

programme.title: The Best of Me (2014)
programme.desc: The funeral of a close friend reunites former high-school sweethearts, who find that they are still in love after 20 years apart.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan (2010)
programme.desc: A single woman (Jennifer Lopez) meets the man (Alex O'Loughlin) of her dreams on the same day she becomes pregnant through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that she's an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Heartburn (1986)
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Clouds of Sils Maria (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran actress (Juliette Binoche) comes face-to-face with an uncomfortable reflection of herself when she agrees to take part in a revival of the play that launched her career 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Outside Providence (1999)
programme.desc: After a young man (Shawn Hatosy) crashes into a police cruiser, his father sends him to boarding school where he struggles to be accepted.

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbor's (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a trucker's (Gérard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: Failure to Launch (2006)
programme.desc: The parents of a young man (Matthew McConaughey) who still lives at home hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to finally leave the nest.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)
programme.desc: An outrageous British woman (Renée Zellweger) decides to take control of her life, but instead falls for two very different men (Colin Firth, Hugh Grant).

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: On this episode Bren shows us a cultural family favorite dessert. It's all about the flan! First she lays out a caramel glazed pumpkin spiced flan, then she moves onto a shaved coconut flan infused with a dash of rum.

programme.desc: Making lemon pepper fish sandwich, served with a tomato onion cucumber salad.

programme.title: Culture Kitchen

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, it's savory and sweet and it's also go big or go home. Bren seasons up and grills a gigantic tomahawk steak that juicy, tender and delicious. Then she makes a huge 4-layer carrot cake topped with homemade butter cream icing.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: This couple wants the extra room in the home to be a get ready room, before leaving the house. Jake and Jazz team up to make an office/ dressing room. The reveal meal is fried beef tacos And churro ice cream sandwiches.
